docket_entries.description: MASTER CALENDAR FEE WAIVER HEARING ON OCT-29-2025 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT SHILOH PARKER'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT.
